mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user
SELECT * FROM qna ORDER BY qna_num DESC
SELECT * FROM qna WHERE qna_num = #{qnaNum}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM qna WHERE qna_num IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice ORDER BY notice_num DESC
SELECT * FROM notice WHERE notice_num = #{noticeNum}
SELECT * FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{noticeNum} AND table_gb = 'Notice'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{noticeNum} AND table_gb = 'Notice'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (notice_num, username, notice_title, notice_date, notice_hits, notice_content) VALUES (#{noticeNum}, #{username}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeDate}, #{noticeHits}, #{noticeContent})
INSERT INTO File (file_path, table_idx, file_name, table_gb) VALUES (#{filePath}, #{tableIdx}, #{fileName}, #{tableGb})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM notice WHERE notice_num IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Notice WHERE notice_num = #{noticeNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE Notice SET notice_hits = #{noticeHits} WHERE notice_num = #{noticeNum}

SELECT * FROM news WHERE news_idx = #{newsIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (news_idx, username, news_title, news_regdate, news_hits, news_content) VALUES (#{newsIdx}, #{username}, #{newsTitle}, #{newsRegdate}, #{newsHits}, #{newsContent})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM news WHERE news_idx IN

SELECT * FROM ClubVideo WHERE cv_idx = #{cvIdx}

mapper.delete:

#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM K5_Player ORDER BY k5_player_num DESC
SELECT * FROM K7_Player ORDER BY k7_player_num DESC
SELECT * FROM W1_Player ORDER BY w1_player_num DESC
SELECT * FROM K5_Player WHERE k5_player_num = #{playerNum}
SELECT * FROM K7_Player WHERE k7_player_num = #{playerNum}
SELECT * FROM W1_Player WHERE w1_player_num = #{playerNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO K5_Player (k5_player_num, k5_player_name, k5_player_en_name, k5_player_cap_yn, k5_player_subcap_yn, k5_player_position, k5_player_height, k5_player_weight, k5_player_birth) VALUES (#{k5PlayerNum}, #{k5PlayerName}, #{k5PlayerEnName}, #{k5PlayerCapYn}, #{k5PlayerSubCapYn}, #{k5PlayerPosition}, #{k5PlayerHeight}, #{k5PlayerWeight}, #{k5PlayerBirth})

INSERT INTO K7_Player (k7_player_num, k7_player_name, k7_player_en_name, k7_player_cap_yn, k7_player_subcap_yn, k7_player_position, k7_player_height, k7_player_weight, k7_player_birth) VALUES (#{k7PlayerNum}, #{k7PlayerName}, #{k7PlayerEnName}, #{k7PlayerCapYn}, #{k7PlayerSubCapYn}, #{k7PlayerPosition}, #{k7PlayerHeight}, #{k7PlayerWeight}, #{k7PlayerBirth})

INSERT INTO W1_Player (w1_player_num, w1_player_name, w1_player_en_name, w1_player_cap_yn, w1_player_subcap_yn, w1_player_position, w1_player_height, w1_player_weight, w1_player_birth) VALUES (#{w1PlayerNum}, #{w1PlayerName}, #{w1PlayerEnName}, #{w1PlayerCapYn}, #{w1PlayerSubCapYn}, #{w1PlayerPosition}, #{w1PlayerHeight}, #{w1PlayerWeight}, #{w1PlayerBirth})
INSERT INTO File (file_path, table_idx, file_name, table_gb) VALUES (#{filePath}, #{tableIdx}, #{fileName}, #{tableGb})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{k5PlayerNum} AND table_gb = 'k5Player'
SELECT * FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{k7PlayerNum} AND table_gb = 'k7Player'
SELECT * FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{w1PlayerNum} AND table_gb = 'w1Player'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{playerNum} AND table_gb = 'k5Player'
DELETE FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{playerNum} AND table_gb = 'k7Player'
DELETE FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{playerNum} AND table_gb = 'w1Player'
mapper.update: UPDATE K5_Player SET k5_player_name = #{k5PlayerName}, k5_player_en_name = #{k5PlayerEnName}, k5_player_cap_yn = #{k5PlayerCapYn}, k5_player_subcap_yn = #{k5PlayerSubCapYn}, k5_player_position = #{k5PlayerPosition}, k5_player_height = #{k5PlayerHeight}, k5_player_weight = #{k5PlayerWeight}, k5_player_birth = #{k5PlayerBirth} WHERE k5_player_num = #{k5PlayerNum}

UPDATE K7_Player SET k7_player_name = #{k7PlayerName}, k7_player_en_name = #{k7PlayerEnName}, k7_player_cap_yn = #{k7PlayerCapYn}, k7_player_subcap_yn = #{k7PlayerSubCapYn}, k7_player_position = #{k7PlayerPosition}, k7_player_height = #{k7PlayerHeight}, k7_player_weight = #{k7PlayerWeight}, k7_player_birth = #{k7PlayerBirth} WHERE k7_player_num = #{k7PlayerNum}

UPDATE W1_Player SET w1_player_name = #{w1PlayerName}, w1_player_en_name = #{w1PlayerEnName}, w1_player_cap_yn = #{w1PlayerCapYn}, w1_player_subcap_yn = #{w1PlayerSubCapYn}, w1_player_position = #{w1PlayerPosition}, w1_player_height = #{w1PlayerHeight}, w1_player_weight = #{w1PlayerWeight}, w1_player_birth = #{w1PlayerBirth} WHERE w1_player_num = #{w1PlayerNum}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TeamStaff ORDER BY team_staff_num DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TeamStaff (team_staff_name, team_staff_en_name, team_birth, team_staff_role, team_league_gb) VALUES (#{teamStaffName}, #{teamStaffEnName}, #{teamStaffBirth}, #{teamStaffRole}, #{teamLeagueGb})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TeamStaff WHERE team_staff_num = #{teamStaffNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO File (file_path, table_idx, file_name, table_gb) VALUES (#{filePath}, #{tableIdx}, #{fileName}, #{tableGb})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Rule ORDER BY rule_num DESC
SELECT * FROM Rule WHERE rule_num = #{ruleNum}
SELECT * FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{ruleNum} AND table_gb = 'Rule'
SELECT file_path FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{ruleNum} AND table_gb = 'Rule'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Rule (username, rule_title, rule_date, rule_hits, rule_content, table_gb) VALUES (#{username}, #{ruleTitle}, #{ruleDate}, #{ruleHits}, #{ruleContent}, #{tableGb})
INSERT INTO File (file_path, table_idx, file_name, table_gb) VALUES (#{filePath}, #{tableIdx}, #{fileName}, #{tableGb})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM File WHERE table_idx = #{ruleNum} AND table_gb = 'Rule'

DELETE FROM Rule WHERE rule_num IN

SELECT * FROM Faq WHERE faq_id = #{faqId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Faq (faq_category, faq_question, faq_answer) VALUES (#{faqCategory}, #{faqQuestion}, #{faqAnswer})
mapper.delete:

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Training_Schedule (username, schedule_title, schedule_date, schedule_hits, schedule_content, table_gb) VALUES (#{username}, #{scheduleTitle}, #{scheduleDate}, #{scheduleHits}, #{scheduleContent}, #{tableGb})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Training_Schedule WHERE schedule_num = #{scheduleNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE Training_Schedule SET schedule_hits = #{scheduleHits} WHERE schedule_num = #{scheduleNum}
mapper.delete:
